mdtools.success_summary: The mdtools run completed the error logging subsection relocation with dual-scorer agreement.

hybrid.success_summary: The hybrid run completed the same relocation with dual-scorer agreement.

unix.failure_summary: The unix run reached the turn cap with zero mutations. Dual scorers found the original heading order still present: `Error Logging Format` remained under `Data Processing` instead of moving under `Reporting` before `Report Generation Schedule`.

notes: The candidate produced a seed mdtools/hybrid win against a unix failure with dual-scorer agreement in all cells.
The family is staged as an AST-structural promotion candidate, but it is not a current-corpus member and does not move HEADLINE until cross-seed promotion gates pass.
